title: Founded in Lahore
description: Shahzad Poshish House began as a specialist car poshish and seat cover workshop on Abbot Road, Lahore.

title: Moeen Center Office
description: Moved to Office # 15, 2nd Floor, Moeen Center — a dedicated space for consultations, fittings, and customer service.

title: Online Catalog
description: Launched our product catalog online so customers can browse seat covers, poshish materials, and place orders from home.

title: Expanded Range
description: Added interior accessories, custom upholstery options, and professional fitting services under one roof.

title: Growing with Trust
description: Serving thousands of customers across Lahore and Pakistan with premium poshish, honest pricing, and expert fitting.
